steps.prompt: Can you make your object SPIN? Tap the ↻ Spin button to turn it!
steps.feedback: It's turning! Round and round like a wheel.

steps.prompt: Keep turning — tap ↻ Spin again to turn it all the way round!
Now try the other way — tap the ↺ Spin back button to turn it back!
steps.feedback: The other way! You can spin it both ways.
